items.title: The end of Trump's 'weaponisation' fund is another sign Republicans are fighting back
items.summary: The $1.8bn fund would have paid people the Trump administration decided were unjustly and politically targeted.

items.summary: On Sunday, South African authorities and nature lovers alike celebrated the centenary of Kruger National Park—a 7,500-square-mile paradise of African wildlife, and a cornerstone of the nation’s conser…
